title: Part 3 – Conversation : une livraison retardée
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Man: I'm calling to check on the status of our shipment, order number 7789. It was supposed to arrive yesterday. Woman: Let me look that up... I see here that the truck was delayed because of a mechanical issue, but it left the warehouse this morning. Man: Do you have an estimated delivery time for today? Woman: Based on the current route, it should arrive at your warehouse between two and four this afternoon. Man: Okay. Could someone call our receiving department about thirty minutes before it arrives? They need time to prepare the loading dock. Woman: Of course, I'll add that note to the driver's instructions right now.

questions.prompt: What is the man calling about?
questions.explanation: Il appelle pour vérifier le statut d'une commande qui devait arriver la veille et qui est en retard.

choices: A mechanical issue with the truck
questions.explanation: La femme explique que le camion a été retardé en raison d'un problème mécanique.

choices: A call to the receiving department before arrival
questions.explanation: Il demande qu'on prévienne le service de réception environ trente minutes avant l'arrivée du camion.
